reviews.review_description: Hello it’s me Mrpoop i think most of u guys know me well the moderators and the owner we met for a little but I had fun I loved the movement but the only bad part loopy didn’t move unless ur the first person in the code and I didn’t see the patch in the ceiling  to get mods but still me and Jsawg and the other moderators and owner were having fun (shout out to PIZZA ELIAM and……THE OWNER) but still reminder make sure u make jets have his mods gone :3

developer_response.body: that is very kind of you. But jet will be keeping his mod

reviews.review_title: Amazing game keep up the good work!
reviews.review_description: This game is fun and silly but one thing is that u can fall out of the map if u go to only up

developer_response.body: thank you. We have patched that glitch

reviews.review_description: I love my games funky. I hope the second one will be good to
I recommend this game a lot it is super fun, if you get this game you will have lots of fun
This game has a TON of glitches. But its fine bc i know the owner is working really hard on it… its still an AMAZING GAME!
